description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:6 Docker image with a cache keyed by $CI_BUILD_REF_NAME that stores node_modules/. Define two stages: test and deploy. Add a test job in the test stage that runs npm install then npm run test. Add a pages job in the deploy stage that runs npm install, npm run build, mv public _public, and mv build public, publishes the public/ directory as an artifact, and is limited to the master and 10-gitlab-pages branches. Ensure the cache is applied to both jobs.
